videos.title: Tales of Eternia Remastered – Announcement Trailer – Nintendo Switch 2
videos.description:
A classic adventure returns in Tales of Eternia Remastered, launching October 16, 2026 on Nintendo Switch 2 and Nintendo Switch. 

Relive an unforgettable journey! Help Reid, Farah, and the rest of the party as they fight to bridge the divide between Inferia and Celestia.  

#NintendoSwitch2 #Ninten

videos.title: Big Walk – Release Date Trailer – Nintendo Switch 2
videos.description:
Big Walk is coming to Nintendo Switch 2 on Aug 4, 2026.

videos.title: FINAL FANTASY VII REVELATION – Reveal Trailer – Nintendo Switch 2
videos.description:
FINAL FANTASY VII REVELATION is coming to Nintendo Switch 2 in spring 2027!  

As the world teeters on the brink of annihilation, your final battle against Sephiroth awaits. 

A meteor mars the sky, monstrous planetary guardians wreak havoc across the globe, and the fires of war rage. Now, it is up

videos.title: Everbloom – Announcement Trailer – Nintendo Switch 2
videos.description:
Everbloom is coming to Nintendo Switch 2 in spring 2027.

videos.title: Nintendo Treehouse Plays Beatspell in Rhythm Heaven Groove – Nintendo Switch
videos.description:
Challenge your sense of rhythm in Rhythm Heaven Groove when it releases July 2, 2026 on Nintendo Switch. Pre-order now: https://ninten.do/6005vgnHv

Join members of Nintendo Treehouse as they play Beatspell, an unlockable single-player mode in Rhythm Heaven Groove.

#RhythmHeavenGroove

Visit Ninten

videos.description:
FINAL FANTASY XIV is coming to Nintendo Switch 2 in Aug 2026. 

Embark on a quest to deliver the land from an eternity of Darkness alongside more than 30 million adventurers worldwide!

videos.description:

videos.description:
Star Fox releases June 25, 2026 on Nintendo Switch 2. Pre-order now: https://www.nintendo.com/us/store/products/star-fox-switch-2/

Hop into the cockpit with Nintendo Treehouse: Live and get a look at Star Fox multiplayer via GameChat! There are some pretty cool AR filters and avatars too.

videos.title: Splatoon Raiders – Gameplay Video – Nintendo Treehouse: Live | June 2026
videos.description:

Venture to the Spirhalite Islands with the Nintendo Treehouse: Live crew in Splatoon Raiders! This deep dive into gameplay features Deep Cut, new Salmon
